description.value: The blade leaves your hands the way a verdict leaves a judge. Throw your held melee weapon at an enemy within 30 feet as a ranged Strike using your melee attack modifier, with no penalty for the throw. On a critical hit, the blade punches through and the target takes 1d6 persistent bleed damage. However it lands, the weapon instantly flies back to your grasp: the Ansu never lets it go.
